round2_improvement_notes.linguistic: Agent provided no output in either round; no improvement possible.
round2_improvement_notes.landscape: Acknowledged other agents' findings (JoJo tanks, rondavels) and used them to reinforce the initial landscape-based hypothesis.
round2_improvement_notes.botanics: Explicitly referenced the Landscape and Meta agents' findings to strengthen the Highveld vegetation argument.
round2_improvement_notes.regulatory: Integrated infrastructure details (drainage) and cross-agent evidence (JoJo tanks) to upgrade confidence from medium to high.
round2_improvement_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain evidence (rondavels, scrubland) to reinforce the meta-indicators of South Africa.

verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly synthesized the evidence, noting the linguistic agent's lack of input and effectively weighting the strong meta-indicators (JoJo tanks) and landscape features (rondavels) to confirm South Africa. The chain of reasoning is clear and eliminates alternatives based on the combined evidence.
